mapper.sql: select t.id, t.task_name, t.bid_id, t.compare_bid_id, t.source_type, t.check_scope, t.compare_library_ids, t.status, t.total_count, t.issue_count, t.risk_count, t.total_text_length, t.overall_similarity, t.text_similarity, t.image_similarity, t.risk_level, t.report_json, t.error_message, t.start_time, t.finish_time, t.create_by, t.create_time, t.update_by, t.update_time, t.remark, t.del_flag, sf.original_name as source_file_name, sf.file_url as source_file_url, sf.file_size as source_file_size, sf.file_type as source_file_type, char_length(sf.extracted_text) as source_text_length from tdw_duplicate_task t left join tdw_duplicate_file sf on sf.task_id = t.id and sf.file_role = 'source' and sf.del_flag = '0'
mapper.insert: insert into tdw_duplicate_task(task_name, bid_id, compare_bid_id, source_type, check_scope, compare_library_ids, status, total_count, issue_count, risk_count, total_text_length, overall_similarity, text_similarity, image_similarity, risk_level, report_json, error_message, start_time, finish_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark, del_flag) values(#{taskName}, #{bidId}, #{compareBidId}, #{sourceType}, #{checkScope}, #{compareLibraryIds}, #{status}, #{totalCount}, #{issueCount}, #{riskCount}, #{totalTextLength}, #{overallSimilarity}, #{textSimilarity}, #{imageSimilarity}, #{riskLevel}, #{reportJson}, #{errorMessage}, #{startTime}, #{finishTime}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{remark}, #{delFlag})
mapper.delete:
update tdw_duplicate_task set del_flag = '2', update_time = now() where id in
#{id}
